messages.content: I have a dog named Biscuit, he's a golden retriever.
Three years old. We adopted him from a shelter in Berlin last summer.
Glad he found a home with you.
I've been living in Berlin for about 2 years now, moved here from London.
Big change. How are you finding it?
Love it. Public transport is amazing compared to London. Also way better for dog owners.
True, Berlin is one of the most dog-friendly cities I know.
